title: Opening a new window on macos via cmd-n defaults to same directory as parent

comments.body: I was able to fix this by installing the macos-spawn-helper utility which properly handles working directory inheritance. Just run `cargo install macos-spawn-helper` and rebuild Alacritty - the new window spawn behavior respects the config setting now.

body:
When I open a new window with Command + N on macOS, the new window opens in the same directory as the parent. Any way to change this?
I have tried setting `general.working_directory` but this doesn't work.
